> {{ description }}

**MCP Server (Python FastMCP) — generated by `sin-mcp-server-builder`.**

Tools: {{ tools | join(', ') }}

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/OpenSIN-Code/sin-{{ slug }}.git
cd sin-{{ slug }}
pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

## Usage

### Run the MCP server

```bash
sin-{{ slug }}-mcp
# or
python -m {{ pkg }}.mcp_server
```

### Register in opencode.json

```json
{
  "mcp": {
    "sin-{{ slug }}": {
      "type": "local",
      "command": ["sin-{{ slug }}-mcp"],
      "enabled": true
    }
  }
}
```

## Project Structure

```
sin-{{ slug }}/
├── src/{{ pkg }}/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── __init__.doc.md
│   └── mcp_server.py
├── tests/
│   └── test_mcp_server.py
├── pyproject.toml
├── README.md
├── SKILL.md
└── .github/workflows/ceo-audit.yml
```

## CoDocs

Every `.py` file has a sibling `.doc.md` companion.
